response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with web/backend depth, but the role specifically requires a Senior C++ developer with industrial automation, IoT (MQTT), message-broker, and IEC 62443 security background. The resume shows only a brief ~7-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015); the listed skill set omits C++ entirely. Current experience is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with no evidence of industrial protocols, SDL/IEC 62443, or multi-threaded C++ systems work.
strengths: 13+ years of software engineering experience spanning embedded, backend, and distributed systems
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background with teaching/mentoring history
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (Sociomantic micro-services, DLang async I/O)
concerns: Minimal and dated C++ experience (only ~7 months at NI in 2014-2015); C++ not listed in current skills
No demonstrated exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850/104, DNP3)
No evidence of MQTT, message-broker architectures, or IoT platform development

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong overall engineering seniority and breadth
